basics.name: Roberto Santos Mazutti Kosmel
basics.label: Junior Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: Junior Full Stack Developer with experience in production web applications and current work on digital initiatives involving software development, requirements, documentation, discovery and backlog organization. Main stack includes TypeScript, React/Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS and product tools, using AI as a supervised support tool to accelerate analysis, documentation and knowledge organization.

work.name: ControlLed
work.summary: Work across software development and product organization for digital initiatives, with focus on requirements, documentation, discovery and backlog structuring.
highlights: Supported discovery, MVP definition, requirements organization and high-level functional/technical documentation.
Created and reviewed SRS, FRD, user stories, acceptance criteria, prioritization matrices and presentations for technical/business alignment.
Structured backlog items in Azure DevOps, helping translate product documentation into actionable development work.
Used supervised AI workflows for transcript analysis, decision summaries, document comparison, text review and technical learning support.

work.name: Blue Exams / The Mindville / MBA No Brainer
work.summary: Worked across multiple web products with a focus on delivery, production stability and cloud operations support.
highlights: Built and maintained web applications with end-to-end delivery across frontend, backend and database layers.
Created and consumed REST APIs with Next.js, Node.js, NextAuth, Stripe and external integrations.
Worked with PostgreSQL and Prisma, supporting maintenance, debugging and production fixes.
Supported deployment and operations on AWS, Linux, Nginx and Docker, including troubleshooting and data/asset migration.

education.institution: Federal University of São Paulo (UNIFESP), São José dos Campos
Federal University of São Paulo (UNIFESP), São José dos Campos

projects.name: Blue Exams — Mock exam subscription platform
projects.description: Subscription-based web mock exam platform with authentication, billing, exam flow and dashboard.
highlights: Implemented core flows in Next.js/React, including login, dashboard and exam experience.
Integrated authentication/access control with NextAuth and subscription billing with Stripe.
Used PostgreSQL via Prisma, supporting production maintenance and fixes.

projects.name: McIntosh V8 — Mobile game in Unity
projects.description: Personal mobile driving game project in Unity/C#, with endless road, procedural traffic, touch controls, audio and scoring loop.
highlights: Implemented vehicle movement with physics, acceleration, braking, virtual steering wheel and keyboard fallback.
Created endless road, NPC spawn/cleanup, distance/speed-based scoring, audio and game-over UI systems.

projects.name: C language compiler
projects.description: C compiler implementation for a C-- language with lexical, syntactic and semantic analysis, intermediate code generation in quadruples and a RISC processor in Verilog for FPGA execution.
highlights: Lexical, syntactic and semantic analysis, intermediate code generation and RISC processor in Verilog.

projects.name: Blue Exams — Landing page
projects.description: Static marketing site deployed on a Linux server.
highlights: Built in HTML/CSS/JavaScript and operated on AWS EC2, Nginx and TLS/Let's Encrypt.
